files.src/data/conflicts.ts:
export interface Conflict {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  region: string;
  country: string;
  parties: string[];
  avgDailyDeaths: number;
  cumulativeDeaths: number;
  startYear: number;
  severity: "major_war" | "war" | "conflict";
  trend: "escalating" | "stable" | "de-escalating";
  description: string;
}

// Deterministic seeded random based on date + conflict id
export function seededRandom(seed: string): number {
  let hash = 0;
  for (let i = 0; i < seed.length; i++) {
    const char = seed.charCodeAt(i);
    hash = ((hash << 5) - hash) + char;
    hash |= 0;
  }
  const x = Math.sin(hash) * 10000;
  return x - Math.floor(x);
}

export function getDailyDeaths(conflict: Conflict, dateStr: string): number {
  const rand = seededRandom(conflict.id + dateStr);
  const variance = conflict.severity === "major_war" ? 0.5 : conflict.severity === "war" ? 0.6 : 0.7;
  const multiplier = 1 + (rand * 2 - 1) * variance;
  return Math.max(0, Math.round(conflict.avgDailyDeaths * multiplier));
}

export function getDateString(daysAgo: number = 0): string {
  const d = new Date();
  d.setDate(d.getDate() - daysAgo);
  return d.toISOString().slice(0, 10);
}

export function getRegionData(conflicts: Conflict[], dateStr: string): { region: string; deaths: number }[] {
  const map = new Map<string, number>();
  conflicts.forEach(c => {
    const d = getDailyDeaths(c, dateStr);
    map.set(c.region, (map.get(c.region) || 0) + d);
  });
  return Array.from(map.entries())
    .map(([region, deaths]) => ({ region, deaths }))
    .sort((a, b) => b.deaths - a.deaths);
}

export function getTrendData(conflicts: Conflict[], days: number = 14): { date: string; deaths: number }[] {
  const result: { date: string; deaths: number }[] = [];
  for (let i = days - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    const dateStr = getDateString(i);
    const total = conflicts.reduce((sum, c) => sum + getDailyDeaths(c, dateStr), 0);
    result.push({ date: dateStr.slice(5), deaths: total });
  }
  return result;
}

}

  { code: 'SDN', name: 'Sudan' },
  { code: 'MMR', name: 'Myanmar' },
  { code: 'COD', name: 'DR Congo' },
  { code: 'SOM', name: 'Somalia' },
  { code: 'SSD', name: 'South Sudan' },
];

export function getFlag(code: string): string {
  const iso = UNHCR_TO_ISO[code] || code;
  return COUNTRY_FLAGS[iso] || COUNTRY_FLAGS[code] || '🏳️';
}

export function getCleanName(name: string): string {
  // Clean up API country names
  return name
    .replace('Syrian Arab Rep.', 'Syria')
    .replace('Dem. Rep. of the Congo', 'DR Congo')
    .replace("Dem. People's Rep. of Korea", 'North Korea')
    .replace('Iran (Islamic Rep. of)', 'Iran')
    .replace('Lao People\'s Dem. Rep.', 'Laos')
    .replace('Rep. of Korea', 'South Korea')
    .replace('Türkiye', 'Türkiye')
    .replace('Venezuela (Bolivarian Republic of)', 'Venezuela')
    .replace('United Rep. of Tanzania', 'Tanzania')
    .replace('Central African Rep.', 'Central African Rep.')
    .replace('Rep. of Moldova', 'Moldova')
    .replace('Viet Nam', 'Vietnam')
    .replace('Rep. of the Congo', 'Congo')
    .replace('Côte d\'Ivoire', 'Côte d\'Ivoire')
    .replace('State of Palestine', 'Palestine');
}

widgets.title: Airspace Closure Monitor

files.src/data/notams.ts:
import { NotamEntry, NotamType, NotamSeverity, Region, CONFLICT_ZONES } from '../types';

const now = new Date();
const h = (hours: number) => new Date(now.getTime() - hours * 3600000).toISOString();
const f = (hours: number) => new Date(now.getTime() + hours * 3600000).toISOString();

let _id = 0;
const mkId = () => `NOTAM-${++_id}`;

function mkNotam(
  overrides: Partial<NotamEntry> & {
    notamId: string; type: NotamType; severity: NotamSeverity;
    location: string; fir: string; country: string; region: Region;
    lat: number; lng: number; radius: number;
    lowerAlt: string; upperAlt: string;
    effectiveFrom: string; effectiveTo: string; issuedAt: string;
    description: string; keywords: string[];
  }
): NotamEntry {
  const isConflictZone = CONFLICT_ZONES.some(z => overrides.country?.includes(z) || overrides.location?.includes(z));
  const issuedTime = new Date(overrides.issuedAt).getTime();
  const isNew = (now.getTime() - issuedTime) < 6 * 3600000;

  const rawLines = [
    `${overrides.notamId} NOTAMN`,
    `Q) ${overrides.fir}/QRTCA/IV/BO/W/${overrides.lowerAlt.replace(/\s/g,'')}/${overrides.upperAlt.replace(/\s/g,'')}`,
    `A) ${overrides.fir}`,
    `B) ${overrides.effectiveFrom.replace(/[-T:]/g,'').slice(0,12)}`,
    `C) ${overrides.effectiveTo.replace(/[-T:]/g,'').slice(0,12)}`,
    `E) ${overrides.description}`,
  ];

  return {
    id: mkId(),
    rawText: rawLines.join('\n'),
    isConflictZone,
    isNew,
    ...overrides,
  };
}

export function generateNotams(): NotamEntry[] {
  return [
    // ═══ CONFLICT ZONES (country-level) ═══
    mkNotam({
      notamId: 'A0147/26', type: 'CONFLICT', severity: 'critical',
      location: 'UKRAINE EASTERN AIRSPACE', fir: 'UKDV', country: 'Ukraine', region: 'Europe',
      lat: 48.38, lng: 37.62, radius: 120,
      countryId: '804',
      lowerAlt: 'SFC', upperAlt: 'UNL',
      effectiveFrom: h(720), effectiveTo: f(2160),
      issuedAt: h(2), description: 'AIRSPACE PROHIBITED. ALL AIRCRAFT OPERATIONS PROHIBITED WITHIN EASTERN UKRAINE FIR DUE TO ONGOING ARMED CONFLICT. ANTI-AIRCRAFT SYSTEMS ACTIVE. EXTREME DANGER TO CIVIL AVIATION.',
      keywords: ['PROHIBITED', 'CONFLICT', 'WAR', 'DANGER'],
    }),
    mkNotam({
      notamId: 'A0148/26', type: 'CONFLICT', severity: 'critical',

      lat: 46.97, lng: 33.35, radius: 150,

      keywords: ['PROHIBITED', 'CONFLICT', 'WAR', 'DANGER AREA', 'FIRING'],
